data.body:
[Millennium Expo Login Event!]

A special login bonus event celebrating the Millennium Expo is underway! Claim your rewards right now~

➡️Event Schedule: 7/8 (Tue) After Maintenance - 8/5 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3217&thread=3022659
